summary: Iteration 191 testing complete: Coven/Party System (Synchronicity Events). All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Coven panel UI with create/join forms, invite code display, member list, and leave functionality. WebSocket connection and ping/pong working.

issues: Trial graduation overlay blocks UI on first visit - user must dismiss it

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/sync/covens creates coven with 8-char invite code, returns success, coven_id, name, invite_code
POST /api/sync/covens/join validates invite code, returns 404 for invalid, 400 if already in coven
POST /api/sync/covens/leave properly removes user from coven, transfers leadership if leader leaves
GET /api/sync/covens/my returns in_coven=false when not in coven, full details with members list when in coven
GET /api/sync/online-count returns current WebSocket connection count
WebSocket /api/ws/sync accepts connection with valid JWT token, rejects invalid tokens
WebSocket ping returns pong with online count
WebSocket position update returns coven_positions for coven members
Frontend coven-toggle-btn (Users icon) in HUD opens coven-panel
Coven panel has coven-name-input, create-coven-btn, join-code-input, join-coven-btn
After creating coven: shows invite code with copy-invite-btn, member list, leave-coven-btn
seed_data_creation: Test covens created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 191 Coven/Party System fully working. Navigate to /cosmic-map, click Users icon (coven-toggle-btn) to open coven panel. Create coven with name, get invite code. Join coven with invite code. Leave coven with leave-coven-btn. WebSocket at /api/ws/sync?token=JWT handles real-time position sharing for coven members. Note: Trial graduation overlay may appear on first visit - click 'Continue with free plan' to dismiss.

backend_apis.POST /api/sync/covens: Creates coven with name, returns coven_id, invite_code (8 chars), success message
backend_apis.POST /api/sync/covens/join: Joins coven via invite_code, returns 404 for invalid code, 400 if already in coven
backend_apis.POST /api/sync/covens/leave: Leaves current coven, returns 400 if not in coven, transfers leadership if leader
backend_apis.GET /api/sync/covens/my: Returns in_coven, coven details with members list, role, invite_code
backend_apis.WebSocket /api/ws/sync: Accepts valid JWT token, ping returns pong with online count, position update returns coven_positions
